body.thing: the ticket's proof-obligation is threaded into the deterministic build packet
body.intention: build_packet surfaces a ticket's Proof obligation section into proof_plan.proof_obligation, so the proof-as-thread reaches the last deterministic layer before the LLM instead of being dropped
